content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(3, 5, 0), (5, 9, 0), (4, 9, 2), (4, 8, 6), (6, 9, 7), (2, 6, 8), (1, 6, 16), (2, 5, 17), (5, 7, 17), (1, 7, 19), (7, 9, 23), (0, 3, 24), (3, 9, 26)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 5 exactly at time 17.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (3, 5, 0) has node 3 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (5, 9, 0) has node 5 and time 0. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 9, 2) has node 4 and time 2. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 8, 6) has node 4 and time 6. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (6, 9, 7) has node 6 and time 7. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 6, 8) has node 2 and time 8. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (1, 6, 16) has node 1 and time 16. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 5, 17) has node 2 and time 17. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (5, 7, 17) has node 5 and time 17. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 7, 19) has node 1 and time 19. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (7, 9, 23) has node 7 and time 23. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 3, 24) has node 0 and time 24. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (3, 9, 26) has node 3 and time 26. -> Add node 9.

Now we have collected all nodes that are linked with node 5 at time 17: [5, 7, 9, 23].

Answer: [5, 7, 9, 23]
